svg.title: Rendering and video assembly stage
svg.desc: Flowchart with three columns. Left column: Manim batch render produces PNG sequences and video clips. Middle column: narration path splits into TTS or human recording, both producing a timing-aligned audio track. Right column: the two streams merge into moviepy/ffmpeg assembly, which adds music and produces the final MP4.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What approved scene files enter the rendering stage?')
sendPrompt('What render quality settings are used and why?')
sendPrompt('How are individual scene clips stitched together?')
sendPrompt('What TTS options work best for educational narration?')
sendPrompt('How does human narration get re-synced to animations?')
sendPrompt('How does timing alignment between narration and animation work?')
sendPrompt('How are scene transitions handled in the assembly step?')
sendPrompt('How is background music mixed without overwhelming narration?')
sendPrompt('What does the quality check look for before final export?')
sendPrompt('What codec and container settings are used for the final MP4?')
